name: Tool and Hardware Latching Storage Box With Handle - Brightroom™: Gray Multi-Compartment Tote, 18L Capacity
description:
Conveniently organize tools and other hardware in the Tool and Hardware Latching Storage Box With Handle from Brightroom™. This rectangle storage box is designed with multiple compartments to offer enough space for all your go-to tools. Made with BPA-free plastic, this water-resistant storage box closes with latches on all four sides and is designed with a top handle for convenient carrying.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
